ASSOCIATION OF ATTORNEYS, 870 MARKET ST, STE 975, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102: MACDONALD, STEVEN ADAIR ADDED AS ATTORNEY FOR THOMAS PAINE PARTNERS,LTD, A CALIF LIMITED PARTNER

9:00AM DEPT 5, JUDGE WICK. C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT, PLTF PRESENT THROUGH COUNSEL, STEVEN MAC DONALD, DEFT MARY DAUGHERTY PRESENT IN PRO PER. ORAL & DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE GIVEN. COURT RECESS. CASE SETTLED. STIPULATION REACHED & READ INTO THE RECORD.
